name: Shadow Ghoul of the Labyrinth
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>迷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>潜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひそ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>むシャドウ・グール
desc: You can discard this card; add 1 "Labyrinth Wall" card from your Deck to your hand. At the start of the Damage Step, if your opponent's monster battles, while you control a "Labyrinth Wall" card: You can banish this card from your GY; destroy that opponent's monster. You can only use each effect of "Shadow Ghoul of the Labyrinth" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can discard this card; add 1 "Labyrinth Wall" card from your Deck to your hand. At the start of the Damage Step, if your opponent's monster battles, while you control a "Labyrinth Wall" card: You can banish this card from your GY; destroy that opponent's monster. You can only use each effect of "Shadow Ghoul of the Labyrinth" once per turn.
eff: You can discard this card; add 1 "Labyrinth Wall" card from your Deck to your hand. At the start of the Damage Step, if your opponent's monster battles, while you control a "Labyrinth Wall" card: You can banish this card from your GY; destroy that opponent's monster. You can only use each effect of "Shadow Ghoul of the Labyrinth" once per turn.

mst: Destroys battling monster at the start of the Damage Step
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
